description: Guided capture for Scuba X1 feature candidates and current clean-path behavior.
name: Scuba X1 Feature Scan

steps.prompt: Make sure the Scuba X1 is online and idle. Keep the Aiper app open on the device overview.
Change the cleaning mode once in the Aiper app if the device is ready for that control.
Change the clean-path preference once in the Aiper app if that control is available.
Start a cleaning run in the Aiper app. Leave any progress, duration, or end-time view visible.
Inspect any cleaning progress, history, elapsed time, remaining time, or completion estimate shown in the app.
Inspect any basket, filter, debris, or maintenance state in the app. Do not reset maintenance during this step.
Use pause if the app exposes it; otherwise stop the cleaning run. Leave the app on the resulting state view.
If the app exposes return, charge, park, surface, or pickup control, trigger it now; otherwise continue without an action.
Leave the device untouched so final REST and MQTT state can settle.
